summary: Completed comprehensive testing of role-based Systems Inventory Dashboard. Backend functionality fully working with all 15 API tests passing. Frontend role-based views verified for Executive and IT Manager dashboards with correct app counts, titles, and permissions.

ui_bugs.issue: Analyst quick demo button intermittently not working

passed_tests: IT Manager login and dashboard (98 apps, 4 cost centers)
Analyst login and dashboard (54 apps, single cost center)
Executive summary narrative changes by role
Cost center filtering for non-admin roles

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor UI issue with demo buttons)
